sql_array: CREATE TABLE TestXML (id INT, name VARCHAR(100), description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO TestXML (id, name, description) VALUES (1, 'Sample', 'This is a test record');
UPDATE TestXML SET description = XMLELEMENT(TAG 'Description', XMLATTRIBUTES(name AS 'Name', description AS 'Value')) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, XMLELEMENT(TAG 'TestRecord', XMLATTRIBUTES(name AS 'Name', description AS 'Value')) AS xml_output FROM TestXML;
